name: anvien
description: Anvien is a code map for AI coding agents. Anvien builds one of the fastest and most accurate code intelligence graphs for large repositories, query via MCP or CLI.
author: Tam Nguyen Dinh <halotam@gmail.com>

scripts.test: node -e "console.log('No Anvien TypeScript test files remain; use go test ./cmd/... ./internal/... and Web UI tests.')"
scripts.postinstall: go run ../cmd/anvien package build-runtime || go run ./go-src/cmd/anvien package build-runtime || cmd /c .\bin\anvien.exe package ensure-runtime || ./bin/anvien.exe package ensure-runtime
scripts.prepack: npm run build && go run ../cmd/anvien package prepare-go-source
scripts.postpack: go run ../cmd/anvien package clean-go-source || cmd /c .\bin\anvien.exe package clean-go-source || ./bin/anvien.exe package clean-go-source
